message:
refactor(runtime): complete ContendedMutex migration in scheduler and E2E tests

Continue the Mutex→ContendedMutex migration started in e03879a:

- scheduler/mod.rs: update WorkStealingScheduler::new() parameter type
- tests/scheduler_stress_fairness_e2e.rs: update setup_state(),
  setup_state_with_clock(), create_task(), and create_n_tasks() helpers
  to use ContendedMutex with "runtime_state" label

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
